title: Managing Risks From a Nuclear Energy Revival
summary: Matthew Bunn presented the seminar "Managing Risks From a Nuclear Energy Revival" at the "Solutions Summit," in New York, NY, on January 12, 2009.
body: Matthew Bunn presented the seminar "Managing Risks From a Nuclear Energy Revival" at the "Solutions Summit," in New York, NY, on January 12, 2009. Dr. Bunn discussed concerns including the problems of accidents, terrorism, and proliferation, and methods to overcome those problems in his talk. The seminar materials can be downloaded below.
